steps: File NTA Form 11 with MUFG Custody to reclaim JPY 119,850 overpaid withholding tax on Nintendo dividend
Submit proof of Norwegian tax residency and JP-NO treaty entitlement supporting 10% rate vs applied 9% rate
Reference account 2401234567 and ISIN JP3902900004 in all correspondence with specific overpayment amount
Follow up with MUFG Custody within 30 days if NTA refund processing is delayed

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
